---
title: "Project"
author: "Patrick Torralba"
format: html
toc: true
  toc-float: true
editor: visual
---

# Research Question: Is the running location statistically significant? Does the running location affect Patrick's distance and mile time?

# Set-up

## library
```{r}
#| label: library
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tidyverse) ## data cleaning
library(sf)
library(tmap) ## add maps

```

## load data
```{r}
#| label: load data
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false


run_df <- read.csv("Activities.csv")
```

## data cleaning
```{r}
#| label: run-df-clean
#| eval: false

run_df_clean <- run_df %>% 
  filter(Activity.Type == "Running") %>% 
  select(Activity.Type, Date, Title, Distance, Time, Avg.HR, Steps, Min.Elevation, Max.Elevation) %>% ## select columns I only need

## Note: I can only proceed once I have the complete dataset on hand after Garmin sends it to me.
```
